name: high-ltv-dedicated-collateral-ask
rationale: Refinance scenario where loan_amount / property_value yields LTV >80% (e.g., $540k requested against $650k appraised = 83% LTV). Triggers F2.AC awaiting_collateral state + F4.HL dedicated high-LTV collateral-ask generator (R10-C-1). Standard preliminary-review path is BYPASSED; dedicated minimal-ask email goes to broker requesting collateral details. Expected behavior: broker-facing email is short, scoped to collateral question, does NOT include full prelim review content.
notes: Single-event sequence. Tests dedicated-generator-bypass discipline — standard prelim generator is bypassed when high-LTV gate fires.
